The '''Burna Trade Route''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace trade route]] that was used to cross the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]], which was located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. This hyperlane along with [[Entana Run]] formed the boundary of [[Urce sector/Legends|Urce Space]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[High Inquisitor]] [[Mox Slosin]] patrolled through this route, looking for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]] in his area.
